title: Better GUI plus Optimized
description: Modpack that optimizes performance and adds better GUI
body:
Modpack to optimize performance, add particle graphics, and add more HUD options.

Optimization Mods
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [kennytvs-epic-force-close-loading-screen-mod-for-fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/forcecloseworldloadingscreen)

Particle Graphic Mods
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)
- [Particle Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core)
- [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain)

UI Mods
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes)

HUD Mod
- [Imagict Hud](https://modrinth.com/mod/imagict-hud)

Other Utility Mods
- [Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot)
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)
